title: Information centre | Stats NZ
content:
Our information advisers connect New Zealanders with official statistics.
We can help you find information on our website, and help you use our online data tools. This service is free.
Help is available on our live website chat from 9.00am–4.30pm, Monday to Friday, excluding public holidays. Select the chat icon at the bottom right of your browser window, or click the link below.
Launch live website chat
Use our online contact form
Phone us between 10.00am–3.00pm Monday to Friday, excluding public holidays.
Freephone: 0508 525 525 (NZ only)
Call from outside New Zealand: +64 4 931 4600 (ext. 2)
We will record all calls to the phone numbers above for quality and training purposes.
If you need assistance with a Stats NZ survey, please contact the Survey team.
Freephone: 0800 809 464 (NZ only)
Email: survey@stats.govt.nz
More details on getting help with surveys
